title: calliandra houstoniana var. colomasensis
intro: Calliandra houstoniana var. colomasensis, also known as the Fairy Tresses or Powder Puff, is a flowering plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, derived from its leaves and flowers. The plant offers various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is also used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Calliandra houstoniana var. colomasensis is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
